description: Style Note It’s time to explore, discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this top is a must-have in your new season wardrobe. Pair this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Blue sleeveless tunic, has a cutaway collar with no top button and a split V neckline, half buttoned placket, a belt with lace detail and loops for the belt around the waist, one patch pocket on either side with pin tucks on it and a buttoned flap closure and lace detailing and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Hand wash using a mild detergent separately Do not bleach or scrub on embroidery and print Dry on reverse side Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style NoteIt’s time to explore, discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with Sepia.
